title: Internal error when declaring parametric mailbox instance inside parametric module using type parameter
body:
Internal Error reported when trying to verilate this example.

```verilog
// tbtop.sv
module dummy #(parameter type T=logic);
    mailbox #(T) mbox;
endmodule
module tbtop;
    typedef struct packed {
        logic a;
        logic b;
    } my_struct_t;
    dummy #(my_struct_t) u_dummy();
endmodule
```

Command
`verilator -cc --exe -x-assign fast -Wall --trace --assert --debug --main --timing tbtop.sv --top-module tbtop`

Version `Verilator 5.006 2023-01-22 rev v5.006`
System `Rocky Linux 8.7 (Green Obsidian) -- rhel/centos/fedora like`

Error message
```
...
- V3LinkDot.cpp:3401: linkDotPrimary: 
- V3LinkJump.cpp:322: linkJump: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1122:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtbtop_006_linkjump.tree
- V3LinkInc.cpp:292:  linkIncrements: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1122:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtbtop_007_linkinc.tree
- V3Param.cpp:1312:   param: 
- V3LinkDot.cpp:3407: linkDotParamed: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1122:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtbtop_009_linkdotparam.tree
%Error: Internal Error: example.sv:2:5: ../V3Broken.cpp:174: Broken link in node (or something without maybePointedTo): 'm_classp && !m_classp->brokeExists()' @ ../V3AstNodes.cpp:1497
                                      : ... In instance tbtop.u_dummy
-node: CLASSREFDTYPE 0x164ce70 <e819> {d2af} @dt=this@(w0)class:mailbox  mailbox cpkg=0x1623b80 -> CLASS 0x1623b80 <e1267> {e29af}  mailbox  L5 [1ps]
    2 |     mailbox #(T) mbox;
      |     ^~~~~~~
- V3Ast.cpp:1122:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtbtop_990_final.tree
- V3Broken.cpp:327:   Broken called under broken, skipping recursion.
- V3StatsReport.cpp:225:statsReport: 
%Error: Internal Error: Aborting since under --debug
...
```
